ocr_findings.description: OCR line 5: '「ペン図」' — image shows '「ベン図」' (ベン diagram; dakuten confusion: ペ vs ベ, changes the term from 'pen diagram' to the correct 'Venn diagram')

reviewer_notes: Trace table (トレース表) explanation page. The 3-row trace table is correctly captured with all numeric values. Flowchart is referenced as an image placeholder. The sole substantive error is ペン図 vs ベン図 (dakuten on ベ lost), which changes the meaning of the term. All other body text and the sidebar box content are accurate.
